payload: M10 Phase 1 Step 1.1: Add engine node type uniqueness constraints to scripts/init-schema.ts — SourceConnector.id, PipelineConfig.id, PipelineStage.id, Gate.id, PipelineState.id, Proposal.id, AuditEntry.id, Snapshot.id, ModelConfig.id, MiroFishConfig.id
m10:1.1 complete — added 10 engine node uniqueness constraints to schema.ts, tsc passes, committed b39edde
m10:1.1 — 10 engine uniqueness constraints verified: correct labels, consistent naming, follows existing pattern, tsc clean
m10:1.1 review passed — constraints verified. Next: m10:1.2 engine types.ts (unblocked, ready)
m10:1.2 — Create src/lib/engine/types.ts with TypeScript interfaces + Zod schemas for all 10 engine node types. Target: webapp/src/lib/engine/types.ts. Use Zod 4. See scratchpad for node type list.
m10:1.2 — Created webapp/src/lib/engine/types.ts with 10 Zod schemas + TS types. tsc passes. Committed efc7e18.
m10:1.2 — types.ts reviewed: 10 Zod schemas + TS types, correct caso_slug placement, tsc clean, no issues
m10:1.2 review passed, Step 1 has 2 remaining sub-tasks: 1.3 config.ts CRUD and 1.4 audit.ts hash chain
m10:1.3 config.ts CRUD — create webapp/src/lib/engine/config.ts with CRUD for 6 config node types (SourceConnector, PipelineConfig, PipelineStage, Gate, ModelConfig, MiroFishConfig)
m10:1.3 config.ts CRUD complete — generic factory for 6 config node types, tsc passes, committed abc19c4
m10:1.3 config.ts CRUD — clean, all 6 types with generic factory, parameterized Cypher, neo4j.int() on LIMIT, Zod validation, caso_slug filtering correct, tsc passes
Step 1.3 config.ts CRUD review passed. Next: Step 1.4 audit.ts — append-only AuditEntry creation with SHA-256 hash chain, chain validation on startup. Task: task-1774075291-6faa
Step 1.4: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/audit.ts — append-only AuditEntry creation with SHA-256 hash chain (appendEntry, getChain, validateChain). See scratchpad for implementation guidance.
Step 1.4 complete: audit.ts with appendEntry, getChain, validateChain. SHA-256 hash chain with genesis, append-only (no update/delete). tsc passes. Committed 0f2ff34.

Step 1.4 audit.ts passes review. All 3 functions correct, hash chain logic sound, Cypher parameterized, tsc verified. Non-blocking nit: unnecessary double cast at audit.ts:117. Step 1 (Engine Data Model) fully complete.
Step 1 (Engine Data Model) fully complete — all 4 sub-tasks committed and reviewed. Advancing to Step 2 (LLM Abstraction Layer).
Step 2.1: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/llm/types.ts — LLM abstraction interfaces (Message, ToolDefinition, ToolCall, LLMOptions, LLMResponse, LLMProvider). See scratchpad for full spec.
Step 2.1: Created webapp/src/lib/engine/llm/types.ts — 6 interfaces (Message, ToolDefinition, ToolCall, LLMOptions, LLMResponse, LLMProvider). tsc passes. Committed 2590b5c.
